title: Fibonacci with memoization
prompt: Read a non-negative integer N from standard input (a single line). Compute fib(N) using memoization (cache results so repeated subproblems are O(1)). Write fib(N) to standard output followed by a single newline and exit with status 0. fib(0) = 0, fib(1) = 1, fib(n) = fib(n-1) + fib(n-2) for n >= 2.
notes_input_convention: Zero reads N from argv[1] because Zero 0.1.2 has no exposed stdin capability. All other languages read from stdin. The harness adapts per language.
